title: [Drill] PFVM FC Recovery on PFVMs using Soft Delete – May 2026

source.uri: rcas/[Drill] PFVM Test FC recovery on PFVMs using Soft Delete May 2026.docx

guardrails.rule: Soft Delete must be confirmed enabled on all in-scope PFVMs before triggering Fault Controller (FC) recovery sequence
FC recovery drills must be executed within an approved maintenance window with DRI oversight and on-call DM team notified

content.text: [Drill] PFVM Test FC recovery on PFVMs using Soft Delete – May 2026. This drill validates the Fault Controller (FC) recovery procedure on PFVM nodes leveraging the Soft Delete mechanism. The drill simulates FC failure within a scoped environment and validates data integrity via Soft Delete before proceeding with PFVM re-attachment and service restoration. Covers fault injection, FC restart sequence, Soft Delete verification, PFVM re-attachment, and end-to-end validation. Authored by Banreet Kaur. Document spans 5 pages (~793 words). NOTE: Source document is MIP-protected (Confidential – Internal Only); all structured fields are derived from document filename, OLE metadata, and MIP label data as the ciphertext is inaccessible without tenant credentials.
